Primary crease continuation demo

This standalone page demonstrates continuation of the outer local-minimum crease for the Rössler y-minimum return map from $a=0.35$, $b=0.3$, $c=4.9$ to $a=0.4775$, $b=0.3$, $c=4.652$. The physical crease is followed on the $M=6$ branch, with a monotone y-minimum check on the intermediate section hits.

The plots show the base return-map seed, the continuation diagnostics, selected one-dimensional return maps, and three-dimensional trajectories. Red is the selected local minimum. In 3D, black is a bounded reference orbit, orange is the construction path from the local ray point to the crease, and blue is the first excursion from the crease until its next y-min return.
parameter steps33
base seeda=0.35, c=4.9
physical branchM=6
